title: Chilli Crispy French Pecan Stir-fry
description: A nutty and gooey low-carb-friendly comfort dish featuring a blend of roasted pecans with the spicy kick from chilli powder.
instructions: Spread the pecan halves on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for about 8-10 minutes or until fragrant and lightly golden. Set aside to cool slightly.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds until aromatic.
Add chilli powder and sauté for another minute. Mix in soy sauce, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes to thicken the sauce.
Fold in cooled pecans along with any accumulated pecan juices if available. If using red bell peppers and snow peas, add these now and stir-fry for another minute until veggies are tender-crisp.
Serve hot as a low-carb-friendly snack or side dish.
